text: I feel a sense of quiet anticipation mixed with a touch of unease. The sterile lights and solitude of the hallway make the world feel distant, as if I'm between places or moments. Stepping into the R+D space, the words on the screen echo my own mood – exposed, a bit uncertain, wanting to be understood. The silence and the glowing text invite introspection, pulling my thoughts toward questions of intention, connection, and the nature of being present in such an artificial yet thoughtful environment.
